description: Overall NordPass has become an essential daily tool in my business
author: Lois O.
pros: It saves so much time and brainpower remembering passwords. The extension is really useful. You can easily update, view, and delete entries in the desktop app.
cons: Sometimes the browser extension is a bit glitchy. Load time isn't great either (for the desktop app) and then it can take a minute for the browser extension to start working. Also it seems to have some issues with creating duplicate entries, and if you click X on the popup to save a password it doesn't ask you again (have done this in a rush before and then lost password info).

review_title: NordPass is Just As Good as DashLane & Most Other PassWord Managers
description: Overall NordPass was great. We had a good experience with it. Getting started with it was great and our employees really liked it.
author: Jeb B.
pros: NordPass has great tie in with our mobile devices. We were able to access all the same data on our phones as we could on the computer.
cons: I didn't think the smaller plans included enough features. We also don't have enough people for the lower plans. We're a small business but they needed 10 seats for the smaller plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good features, but not the easiest to navigate
author: Bruce S.
pros: It had a wide range of features and seemed very effective at the service that it offered across said features
cons: Clunky and difficult to use in our opinion. It seemed like it was trying to do too much as opposed to a few things simply.

description: A reliable, trust worthy and agile system which can adapt to your needs and securely manage your SSO and company data. Highly recommended for starting your journey in a digital cyber secure way without worrying.
author: Will B.
pros: From the minds of NordVPN comes a reliable way to manage your business’s passwords, Single Sign On and security details. Nord is a forward thinking company and this is reflected in how NordPass Business feels in its use and integration.
cons: NordPass Business is newer to the market than some longer standing security solutions. This means senior stakeholders may need explanation as to why it is worth the switch. However this is quickly overcome and the pricing model and interesting bolt-ons keep the offer agile.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mouloukou K.
pros: - it's very easy to setup, connect and switch between countries. From a desktop computer as well as a phone
cons: - compare to other VPns and more specifically, surfshark the number of devices is higher so the value for money can be better on other VPns
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: NordPass Business - better for the entire Company
description: It says what it can do and that is what you get! I had one minor problem with understanding the passcodes, and they were quick to respond - within 24 hours. It is reliable and accurate. It watches your back and lets you know which companies you have a password with that got whacked that day! I couldn't be happier since their price was in line, or better than the competition!
author: Darrell B.
pros: The entire ease of grading the complexity of your password, the fact that it looks on the darkweb for your using name and passwords, the ability to use passcodes instead of passwords, their VPN which is monitored for security.....
cons: Nothing. It works like the proverbial clock! It has all the features that I am looking for and is priced nicely for corporate use.

author: Stu K.
pros: All my passwords from Chrome were automatically imported so I didn't need to do any manual adding except for some specific sites where I didn't save the password in the browser. I love the autofill and password generator functions, they really speed up log-ins and sign-ups!
cons: From time-to-time the auto-fill feature doesn't work and simply opens up the software instead meaning I have to copy/paste the password across. It's only a minor issue but having being used to the great time saver of the auto-fill I certainly miss it when it doesn't work properly

description: It was brought in to provide cyber security as we would have a lot of personal data from current and previous families
author: Conor M.
pros: It gives good security and ensures we are working in a GDPR compliant mann er in relations to data management
cons: It took a while to ensure settings for home access were correct as Nord gives a very secure platform.

author: ville P.
pros: Modern, "Future-Proof" Encryption, Exceptional User Experience, Advanced Admin & Security Dashboard, Effortless Sharing & Provisioning, Unique "Email Masking" Feature
cons: "Finicky" Autofill and Browser Extension, Limited Advanced Admin Controls, The "Two-Password" Confusion, Feature Gaps in Lower Tiers, Mobile Admin Limitations

review_title: Overall a great security firmware for small business
author: Mitchell D.
pros: Nordpass is perfect for securing multiple devices within one account
cons: Nordpass can be a bit invasive as a background app
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: NordPass protege tus accesos y contraseñas
description: Estoy encantado con esta aplicacion, sin duda es la mejor. Me ayuda al proteger mis contraseñas en sitios vulnerables.
author: Bryan Jerico B.
pros: Que detecte mis contraseñas seguras, antiguas, o pocas seguras y ademas que me avise el nivel de seguridad que tiene cada una de ellas.
cons: Me hubiera gustado poder administrar mejor los accesos y bajar un poco el precio

review_title: Nord is always develop best software!
description: All over experience is amazed ! I love with Nord but I am student so I don't have money to buy this and my parents never buy this for me
author: Shivam K.
pros: Just can't believe it ! This is best password manager I use Nord Products every time and this NordPass have really good feature . Nord Pass easily manage your all passwords and credit cards and information's I am using Nord Pass i always forget my all password and then I need to forget it but after i got NodePass I don't need to forget my password ! and its also trustable to use this If you always forget your password so i think this is the best to use this !
cons: All features good but I think this is expensive for student who always forget password and try to give update's in month week
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: its great application we can generate random password and keep it safe.
author: Hammad H.
pros: this software is best because we don't need to remember password even you can manage random generated password as well. because we can login with single click.
cons: as I am using trial version it has some limitation like I cannot use this software all my device at the same time. and it should be free as chrome and Firefox provide same service free of cost.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Satisfactory, makes me feel safe regardless
author: Larissa C.
pros: Easy and quick to use and makes me feel comfortable that I am being protected
cons: nothing. everything works well and its a wonderful platform to use.

review_title: User friendly tool that makes security simple
author: Philip S.
pros: The ease of use is comparable to other similar industry leading tools, but the feature set is even greater.
cons: I have not noticed any cons with this tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Had to leave Lastpass due to their abject failure at security
description: I miss Lastpass's ease of use. There's really no comparison but we could not handle any more of the security breaches on their part. I would go back in a flash if I thought they had control of their problems. As it is, I feel like I am stuck with an inferior product. What prompted this review is that just today, they released software that no longer autofills your password. Feel free to read that again - the password filling software does not fill your passwords in. This is what your software does and somehow you managed to release software that does not do that. Granted support chat told me they will have a fix out tomorrow but....??? On the upside, unlike Lastpass, they haven't left a door open for hackers to get all my passwords. So far anyway....
author: Charles S.
pros: I had used Nord VPN for years and found them to be very reliable and straight-forward.
cons: It is a very immature product as compared to Lastpass. The auto-fill functions for both passwording and credit card is sketchy at best. More often than not I have to key in my card. For reasons that are still unknown, shared passwords are almost totally unavailable on a mobile device. The last solution I was given was to delete it and add it back. And the problem isn't that it isn't shared - it is inaccessible EVEN if you were the original owner.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Life Saver of the Digital Area
description: It really feels safe! And the bonus is it's really user-friendly. It has a really trackable dashboard to see all your information from one place.
author: Arzu Ö.
pros: I am happy that I was able to discover many pro features in the 1-month pro plan trial. It really is amazing at storing our passwords and creating new passwords on the fly! It also keeps your personal information for example, addresses, phone numbers, and card information. It means yo do not need to write your address manually all the time when you submit a form.
cons: Unfortunately, sometimes the application makes me log out. I do not why but I think it's because of security maybe. But anyway it makes things a little bit harder. Also, I think the pricing is a little bit high.

review_title: Free version is a great and also includes all main features
author: Saajan B.
pros: EXCELLENT! The free version is far better than its competitor's free versions. I have been using NordPass for more than a year, so far a really solid app.
cons: Good app but the problem can start with the fact that, "IF the app doesn't have the right permissions granted it doesn't auto-fill or save info correctly sometimes".

description: There are many free services that will save your passwords and eliminate the hassle of keeping track of them, however the security of these services may be questionable. They certainly don't have the additional security measures provided by Nordpass Business.
author: Yin C.
pros: Nordpass Business not only saves my passwords, it also keeps them securely stored and encrypted. I know that I'm the only person who will have access and I have never lost access to an account since using Nordpass.
cons: While it isn't terribly expensive, I think Nordpass should come free with the purchase of Nord VPN services.

author: Harrison B.
pros: Keeping a secured file of my most important passwords and log in details. Being able to lock them behind two factor authenticated password wall is massive peace of mind
cons: The auto recognition and changes of passwords can sometimes feel clunky. Aka creating multiples of accounts for the same site instead of it changing the password
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use but a bit intense
author: Ariel E.
pros: I like how well it works with apps downloaded in my laptop and how fast it’s syncing when i take my mobile.
cons: It doesnt work well if you also use another password manager. It covers the other and doesnt allow you to choose it. Also it requires an password entry instead of a dactilar passkey
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ilenia F.
pros: Multi-factor authentication is easy and has amazing cybersecurity features.
cons: Not a problem as NordPass Business has all features.

author: Shauna M.
pros: It is an easy way to generate good passwords and manage.
cons: I can't copy and paste passwords into it, only out of it. For example if a password is generated for another site, I have to manually input it into nordpass.

description: NordPass has taken the place of Google for my password storage and credit card vault. The encryption seems safer. I was able to import my passwords, which was a huge plus. Also, I am able to continue to use fingerprints for my log ins.
author: Gwen S.
pros: I am finding the free version of NordPass to have everything I need, but if security breech protection is high on your list, then the paid version is one of the most affordable. The free version allows you to install on multiple devices, but you can only log into one at a time.
cons: NordPass is lacking in its ability to autofill mobile app forms.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, everything works fine, it does the job and you can use it on multiple devices without the need to remember strong passwords.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use software for password management. Password generator is very helpful as well, it generates very strong passwords without the need to remember them. Moreover, it's great that the tool could be used on multiple devices.
cons: Sometimes there's miscommunication between browser and NordPass. For example, when the password is updated, NordPass doesn't notice that change and you only have old password on the app. Moreover, it doesn't recognise browser extensions. For instance, when you want to use browser extension where you need to log in, NordPass doesn't recognise the extension and it only sees the URL of the website that you're visiting, so it suggests wrong autofill option.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
